{{Location|title=Murika|imagecaption=Map of Murika|type=|image=File:MurikaFullMap.png}}

==Murika==
A supposed land of freedom and equality, fraught in antagonism between mech-enhanced and bio-enhanced superheroes and villains.

Welcome to Murika. I'm the 12th Prince of Nirenia. My sports car is seized on the dock. I need 30k dollars to get it back, but my account has been suspended for 7 days. Anyone who gives me 30k dollars will get half a million back after 7 days.

Murika is the 4th of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}

==INTEL==
See [[Murika INTEL]] for INTEL tables.

==Apostles ==
See [[Murika Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Murika Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Murika and what they can be redeemed for.

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Murika Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Murika, how to complete them, and what they reward.

==Murika Heroes==
For information on Heroes, see [[Murika North Heroes]] and [[Murika South Heroes]]

==Realm Trait - Lady Liberty==
See [[Lady Liberty]] for information on cost, stats, and unsealing. 

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Murika]]
